name: Cornish Hens with Raisin-Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------RICE PILAF---------------------------------
1/4 cup raisins
1/2 cup brandy
1 1/3 cups cooked wild rice
1 1/3 cups diced carrots
2/3 cup diced celery
1 teaspoon cinnamon
Vegetable cooking spray
Remove giblets from hens and discard. Rinse the hens under cold, running water and pat dry. Remove skin and trim excess fat. Split the hens in half lengthwise. Place the hens, meaty side up, on a rack in a roasting pan.
Combine brandy, apple juice, and paprika in a bowl. Stir well. Brush the hens with the mixture. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until juices run clear, basting every 15 minutes. Serve with raisin-rice pilaf and garnish with carrot curls and strips.
